THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JERI WILLIAMS, ANGELA SUED AS DOE, ANGELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 500 ANDOVER ST, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-30-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFS. FORF. SECURITY DEPOSIT. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. DEFS. STIP THERE ARE NO OTHER ADULT INDIV. IN POSSESSION. WR IT MAY ISSUE & BE POSTED IMMEDIATLEY. EACH BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES. IF DEFS COMPLY W/ALL CONDITIONS, PL WILL S/A JUDGMENT, DISM & SEAL FILE AS TO NOTICE TO QUIT. SEE FILE.
